publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2020-09-14 18:26:19 -0400.

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

origination.label: source
origination.corpname: Cornell University. Herbert F. Johnson Museum of Art.

did.abstract: Approximately 316 commercial movie stills published between 1931 and 1956, from studios including Metro-Goldwyn-Mayer, Republic Pictures, Warner Brothers, RKO Radio Pictures, Puritan Pictures, Astro Pictures Corp. and 20th Century Fox.

scopecontent.head: Content Description
scopecontent.p: Approximately 316 commercial movie stills published between 1931 and 1956, from studios including Metro-Goldwyn-Mayer, Republic Pictures, Warner Brothers, RKO Radio Pictures, Puritan Pictures, Astro Pictures Corp. and 20th Century Fox.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Motion picture stills collection, #8718. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

controlaccess.corpname: Cornell University. Herbert F. Johnson Museum of Art.

did.unittitle: The trail of the lonesome pine
The treasure of the Sierra Madre
